introSection: Kikkerachtbaan was a steel roller coaster located at Duinrell in Wassenaar, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Kikkerachtbaan closed on 9 November 2025. A new roller coaster, Kikkerachtbaan 2.0, is planned to open in 2026.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Kikkerachtbaan was a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train design is based on the park's mascot, Rik de Kikker. This train design was updated in 2003 to match the updated design of Rik.

fullText:
Kikkerachtbaan was a steel roller coaster located at Duinrell in Wassenaar, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands.

Kikkerachtbaan closed on 9 November 2025. A new roller coaster, Kikkerachtbaan 2.0, is planned to open in 2026.

Kikkerachtbaan was a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

Green track and supports.

The train design is based on the park's mascot, Rik de Kikker. This train design was updated in 2003 to match the updated design of Rik.
